problem id: 0d7aacfc
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11000000 -> 10110000
  00010110 -> 00101001
  11100001 -> 11111010
  11110011 -> 11011010
  11101011 -> 11101100
  01101000 -> 11001010
  00010101 -> 00101111
  01010011 -> 10110010
  11111101 -> 11000101
  10101010 -> 01111110

query: 10100100
predicted answer: 01100001
